communityconfiguration-abstractwikisugge: Title of the AbstractWikiSuggestedWikifunctions provider in the CommunityConfiguration UI (Special:CommunityConfiguration). The provider manages the list of HTML-returning Wikifunctions offered in the Abstract Article "Add fragment" menu.
Description shown under the provider title in the CommunityConfiguration UI. Explains what the list is used for.
Label for the array-of-ZIDs field in the CommunityConfiguration editor form.
Help text shown with the field. Explains the expected input (a Wikifunctions ZID that returns HTML) and the ten-entry cap. * Z20756 — an example ZID, does not need translation.

Label used for each row of the suggested-functions list in the CommunityConfiguration editor form. Parameters:
* $1 — the 1-based position of the row (1, 2, 3, ...).
content-model-abstractwiki: The label used when describing the page contents for an Abstract Article.
wikilambda-abstract-content-object: Label shown at the top of the Abstract Article editor.
wikilambda-abstract-content-history-titl:
Title of the page showing the history of edits to an Abstract Article, similar to {{msg-mw|wikibase-history-title-with-label}}.

Parameters:
* $1 – The title in the user's language, or a fallback language if not set.
* $2 – The QID (actual wiki page title) of the page.

Title of the page showing the history of edits to an Abstract Article when no Wikibase label can be resolved; only the QID is shown.

Parameters:
* $1 – The QID (actual wiki page title) of the page.
wikilambda-abstract-edit-title-with-labe:
Title for the page for editing the Abstract Article of a given Wikidata Item Id, showing the title of the item in the user's language if available.

Parameters:
* $1 - The title in the user's language, or a fallback language if not set.
* $2 - Wikidata Item Id and title of the Abstract Wikipedia content page.
wikilambda-abstract-edit-title:
Title for the page for editing the Abstract Article of a given Wikidata Item Id.

Parameters:
* $1 - Wikidata Item Id and title of the Abstract Wikipedia content page.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-fragments-:
{{Doc-important|The word '''typed''' doesn't mean "written using a keyboard". It means "having a [[:w:en:Data type|data type]]".}}

Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the section's fragment list is of the wrong type.

Parameters:
* $1 - The section key.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-qid:
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the internal Qid does not match a valid Wikidata Item Id syntax.

Parameters:
* $1 - The given qid.
wikilambda-abstract-error-nonexistent-qi:
Error shown when a user tries to publish an Abstract Article for a Wikidata item that does not exist.

Parameters:
* $1 - The given qid.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-section-co:
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the section content is not well-formed.

Parameters:
* $1 - The section key.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-section-in:
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the section index is not a positive integer.

Parameters:
* $1 - The section key.
* $2 - The section index.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-section-qi:
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the section key is not a valid Wikidata Item Qid.

Parameters:
* $1 - The section key.
wikilambda-abstract-error-invalid-conten: Error shown when an invalid Abstract Article edit is made.
wikilambda-abstract-error-invalid-json: Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the internal object is not a valid JSON object.
wikilambda-abstract-error-invalid-title:
Error shown when a user tries to create an Abstract Article with an invalid title.

Parameters:
* $1 - The given, invalid title.
wikilambda-abstract-error-missing-lede-s: Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the object doesn't have the mandatory lede section.
wikilambda-abstract-error-missing-sectio:
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the section has no fragment list.

Parameters:
* $1 - The section key.
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the object has no sections.
wikilambda-abstract-error-unmatching-qid:
Error shown when validating an Abstract Article page and the internal Qid does not match the page title Qid.

Parameters:
* $1 - The qid property in the abstract content.
* $2 - The page title.
wikilambda-abstract-fragment-actions-men: Accessible label for the menu button that provides actions for a fragment (move, insert, delete) in the Abstract Article editor.
wikilambda-abstract-fragment-function-se:
Short helper text shown below the function selector in the Abstract Article fragment editor when the field is empty and a bound return type is required. Visible alongside the help popover toggle button.

Parameters:
* $1 - ZID of the expected return type (for example, Z89).
* $2 - Label of the expected return type (for example, HTML Fragment).

'Learn more' wikitext link inside the help popover of the function selector in the Abstract Article fragment editor. Points to the Abstract Wikipedia help page explaining how to use functions with different return types via an interwiki link.

Placeholder text shown in the function selector input in the Abstract Article fragment editor when selecting the function of a function call (Z7K1) with a bound return type.

Parameters:
* $1 - ZID of the expected return type (for example, Z89).
* $2 - Label of the expected return type (for example, HTML Fragment).

Body text of the help popover for the function selector in the Abstract Article fragment editor. Explains why some functions are not shown in the search results.

Parameters:
* $1 - ZID of the expected return type (for example, Z89).
* $2 - Label of the expected return type (for example, HTML Fragment).
Title of the help popover for the function selector in the Abstract Article fragment editor. Shown as the popover heading when the user clicks the help toggle button.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-fragments-acces: Accessible label for the menu button for selecting and adding a new fragment
wikilambda-abstract-menu-group-basic-fra: Text for the Abstract Article fragment menu group with actions to add basic fragments.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-group-insert-fr: Text for the Abstract Article fragment menu group with actions to insert new fragments at different positions.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-group-move-frag: Text for the Abstract Article fragment menu group with actions to move fragments to different positions.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-group-special-f: Text for the Abstract Article fragment menu group with actions to add fragments given by configured functions that return HTML.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-add-empt: Label for the menu option to add a new empty fragment
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-add-name:
Label for the menu option to add a new fragment given by a function name. Appears several times in one menu with several function names. See screenshot.

Parameters:
* $1 - Name of the function to add.
[[File:Abstract Wikipedia - Create a New Abstract Article for Q18383 (Providence) screenshot.png|thumb|300px]]
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-add-sect: Label for the button to add a new section in the Abstract Content editor.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-delete-f: Label for the menu option to delete the selected fragment.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-insert-a: Label for the menu option to insert a fragment below the selected one.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-insert-b: Label for the menu option to insert a fragment above the selected one.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-move-aft: Label for the menu option to move the selected fragment one position below
wikilambda-abstract-menu-option-move-bef: Label for the menu option to move the selected fragment one position above.
wikilambda-abstract-preview-fragment-max: Error message when an Abstract Wikipedia fragment tried to render too many times, requesting the user to try again later.
wikilambda-abstract-preview-fragment-ret: Text for a link with a call to action to retry rendering an Abstract Wikipedia fragment that failed.
wikilambda-abstract-preview-in-language: Label for the preview of the Abstract Article rendered into a user-specified language.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create: Title for the Special page to create a new Abstract Article
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-creat: Label for the button to create a new Abstract Article on the Special:CreateAbstract page.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-exist: Warning message to users who try to create an Abstract Article about an existing topic. The next line following the colon is the label and QID of the Abstract Article, as a link.

Explantory message to users who navigate to create an Abstract Article about an existing topic. This message is shown on the Special:ViewAbstract page when users are redirected from the Special:CreateAbstract page after trying to create an Abstract Article about an existing topic.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-intro:
Intro warning text for the Special page to create a new Abstract Article.

Parameters:
* $1 - link to the community rules page, hard-coded for now to Special:MyLanguage/Abstract:List_of_policies_and_guidelines.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-not-e: Intro text for the Special page to create a new Abstract Article when the feature is not enabled.
Title for the Special page to create a new Abstract Article when the feature is not enabled.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-qid:
Title for the Special page to create a new Abstract Article for a given Wikidata Item Id.

Parameters:
* $1 - Wikidata Item Id and title of the Abstract Wikipedia content page.
wikilambda-abstract-special-view: Title for the Special page to view an Abstract Article
